name: mumbai_wards
description: Mumbai ward boundaries — 24 administrative wards as polygons stored as a local GeoJSON file.
notes: Load directly with gpd.read_file(). The population column contains census estimates per ward. For metric spatial operations, project to EPSG:32643 (UTM zone 43N). Use make_valid() on geometry before any spatial operation.
example_code:
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid

def download_data():
    global result
    result = gpd.read_file('/data/mumbai_ward_shapefile/Mumbai_wards.geojson')
    result['geometry'] = result['geometry'].apply(make_valid)

download_data()
